mapper.sql: left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = r.spu_id

r.review_id, r.review_no, r.review_type, r.review_status, r.spu_id, r.system_spu_code, r.seller_id, r.seller_name, r.category_id, r.category_name, r.product_name_before, r.product_name_after, r.main_image_url_before, r.main_image_url_after, r.submit_terminal, r.submit_subject_id, r.submit_account_id, r.submit_user_name, r.submit_time, r.reviewer_id, r.reviewer_name, r.review_time, r.review_reason, r.risk_level, r.risk_summary, r.item_count, r.sku_count, r.price_before_min, r.price_before_max, r.price_after_min, r.price_after_max, r.currency_summary, case when r.warehouse_summary in ('official', 'third_party', 'MIXED') then r.warehouse_summary when wh.warehouse_kind_summary in ('official', 'third_party', 'MIXED') then wh.warehouse_kind_summary when r.warehouse_summary is not null and r.warehouse_summary != '' then 'third_party' else '' end as warehouse_summary, r.diff_summary, r.active_pending_key, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark
mapper.select:
select
from product_review_request r
where r.review_id = #{reviewId} and r.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select * from product_review_request where spu_id = #{spuId} and review_status = 'REJECTED' and review_type in ('NEW_PRODUCT', 'ADD_SKU', 'EDIT_PRODUCT_INFO', 'EDIT_SKU_INFO') and del_flag = '0' order by review_id desc limit 1
select count(1) from product_review_request where active_pending_key = #{activePendingKey} and review_status = 'PENDING' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into product_review_request( review_no, review_type, review_status, spu_id, system_spu_code, seller_id, seller_name, category_id, category_name, product_name_before, product_name_after, main_image_url_before, main_image_url_after, submit_terminal, submit_subject_id, submit_account_id, submit_user_name, submit_time, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, review_time, review_reason, risk_level, risk_summary, item_count, sku_count, price_before_min, price_before_max, price_after_min, price_after_max, currency_summary, warehouse_summary, diff_summary, active_pending_key, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{reviewNo}, #{reviewType}, #{reviewStatus}, #{spuId}, #{systemSpuCode}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{productNameBefore}, #{productNameAfter}, #{mainImageUrlBefore}, #{mainImageUrlAfter}, #{submitTerminal}, #{submitSubjectId}, #{submitAccountId}, #{submitUserName}, #{submitTime}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewerName}, #{reviewTime}, #{reviewReason}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskSummary}, #{itemCount}, #{skuCount}, #{priceBeforeMin}, #{priceBeforeMax}, #{priceAfterMin}, #{priceAfterMax}, #{currencySummary}, #{warehouseSummary}, #{diffSummary}, #{activePendingKey}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update product_review_request set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewer_name = #{reviewerName}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where review_id = #{reviewId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into product_review_item( review_id, item_type, change_type, spu_id, sku_id, system_sku_code, seller_sku_code, item_status, before_hash, after_hash, diff_summary, risk_summary, sort_order, create_time ) values ( #{reviewId}, #{itemType}, #{changeType}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{systemSkuCode}, #{sellerSkuCode}, #{itemStatus}, #{beforeHash}, #{afterHash}, #{diffSummary}, #{riskSummary}, #{sortOrder}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from product_review_item where review_id = #{reviewId} order by sort_order asc, item_id asc
select * from product_review_snapshot where review_id = #{reviewId} order by snapshot_id asc
select * from product_review_operation_log where review_id = #{reviewId} order by operation_time desc, log_id desc
